description: Parses the user query to extract the number for factorial calculation and generates the required function call JSON structure with math.factorial as the function name

inputs.name: query_text
inputs.description: The user query text that contains the factorial calculation request and number to be extracted

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: String representation of available function definitions to ensure proper function selection and parameter mapping

output.description: Returns the function call structure with math.factorial as the top-level key and number parameter nested below. Example format: {"math.factorial": {"number": 5}} where the number is extracted from the query text.

fields.math.factorial: dict containing the number parameter as an integer value extracted from the user query

workflow_spec.name: Factorial Function Call Generator
workflow_spec.description: Analyzes a user query about calculating factorials and generates the appropriate function call JSON structure for the math.factorial function with extracted parameters
